__fixture__.name: projected_notebook_result_badge_group
__fixture__.scenario: A notebook result grid is a current projection of a kernel execution result. It is not itself writable source, so the badge group points to the notebook cell and offers an editable overlay path.

source_of_truth_relation.relation_label: The result grid is projected from the notebook cell execution and kernel result, not authored as a source file.

write_authority.authority_summary: Typing into the projected result does not mutate the notebook source cell or kernel data.

dirty_state.dirty_scope_label: Projection has no source dirty state
dirty_state.dirty_summary: The result view does not own source edits; overlays are separate objects.

freshness.freshness_summary: The result is current for the last completed cell execution, but it is still a projection.

reason_strip.cause_plain_language: This result grid is a projected notebook output, not a source document.
reason_strip.scope_plain_language: The state applies to the displayed result view and not to the notebook cell source.
reason_strip.boundary_plain_language: The protected boundary is live target and projection identity.
reason_strip.safe_next_step_plain_language: Create an editable overlay for notes or open the notebook cell source to change computation.

canonical_source_relation_row.source_label: Notebook cell 17 and its execution result are the canonical basis for this projection.

next_safe_action.action_summary: Creates an overlay for annotations without mutating the notebook output or source cell.

export_and_accessibility.accessible_name: Notebook result projection. Open the source cell or create an editable overlay; direct result editing is unavailable.
